user.title: Solar Charge Balancer
user.description: Activate the integration with a friendly name. All settings — PV, battery, chargers, thresholds and notifications — are configured right after from the 'Configure' button.

data_description.title: Label shown in Home Assistant, e.g. 'Home' or 'Workshop solar'.

init.title: Solar Charge Balancer
init.description: Pick a section to configure. You can come back any time: changes are saved only when you press 'Save & exit'.

preset.title: Solar system preset
preset.description: Leave **Auto-detect** to let the integration analyse existing entities and pick the best matching preset, or select your brand manually. Every field remains editable in the next steps.

data_description.preset: Auto-detect: each preset is scored against your entities and the highest-scoring one is applied. Huawei → huawei_solar (HACS). Other entries use the official same-named integrations.
data_description.battery_capacity_kwh: Huawei LUNA 2000: 5 kWh per module (2 modules = 10 kWh). Leave at 0 to use the preset default.

preset_apply.title: Detection result

pv.title: Solar production
pv.description: Select one or more power (W) entities. If you have multiple inverters or strings, add them all: they will be summed to obtain the total production.

data_description.pv_power_entities: Add as many as you need. The sum represents the instantaneous total production.

data_description.house_power_entity: Instantaneous (W) power of the whole house.
data_description.grid_export_negative: ENABLED (default): negative = export/selling, positive = import/buying. DISABLE if your sensor is inverted, i.e. positive when exporting/selling and negative when importing/buying.

battery.title: Home batteries
battery.description: Add, edit or remove battery packs. Power and SOC are aggregated automatically (capacity-weighted average for SOC).

battery_form.title: Configure battery
battery_form.description: Each unit has its own entities. Capacity (kWh) is used to weight the average SOC when you have multiple packs.

data_description.name: Label shown in entity names, e.g. 'Powerwall' or 'LuxPower'.
data_description.capacity_kwh: Used to weight the average SOC across packs. Leave at 0 if unknown.

battery_thresholds.title: Battery thresholds (global)
battery_thresholds.description: These thresholds apply to the battery system considered as a whole.

data_description.battery_min_soc: Below this level batteries always win over EV charging.
data_description.battery_target_soc: Above this level the surplus goes to the EV.
data_description.battery_max_charge_w: Maximum total power all batteries together can absorb.

chargers.title: EV chargers
chargers.description: Add, edit or remove wallboxes. Each charger has its own entities and priority.

charger_form.title: Configure charger
charger_form.description: These settings apply to this charger only. The algorithm allocates current based on priority and the global distribution strategy.

data_description.name: Shown in entity names, e.g. 'Garage' or 'Living room'.
data_description.priority: With the same mode, lower priority (smaller number) is served first.

data.battery_fast_soc: Battery Fast: minimum battery SOC for EV (%)

data_description.charger_distribution: How to split the total EV power between chargers.
data_description.max_household_tolerance_pct: Pre-alarm: warn when total load exceeds (1 − tolerance) × cap. Default 10% → warning at 90% of cap, alarm at 100%.
data_description.fast_grid_budget_w: Maximum grid power Fast mode is allowed to import on top of PV. Default 3000 W.
data_description.battery_fast_soc: In Battery Fast mode the EV gets PV only after the home battery has reached this SOC. Default 98%.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose notify.* channels and which events to notify.

error.auto_detect_failed: No supported preset matched any entity in this instance. Please pick the brand manually from the dropdown.
